chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1296 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 28-11-2023 Petitioner present in person Mr. Israr Ali Shah, Advocate for Respondents No.1 to 4 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Muneer Shah Mushwani, Assistant Registrar of this court under the orders of this court visited the site on 25.10.2023, and found that the outer gate of the premises was locked and key of the same was in possession of the opponent party, whereas the keys of main gate of the quarter No. A-3 and rooms No.1 and 2 inside it were with petitioner and he was found in possession thereof. In light of that report and with consent of the parties this petition is disposed of in terms that respondent No.4 is directed to handover the possession of Quarter No.A-3 already allotted to the petitioner vide order dated 15.11.2019, with unhindered access to it and submit such report for a perusal in chamber within 15 days. The petition is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
